## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Penelope's idea for a go-to-market engine package for portfolio companies and explore potential collaboration with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/4yXj4QzosCmwri_9ngynsJTHxW75jncZ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Penelope is developing a comprehensive go-to-market engine package for portfolio companies post-product-market fit](https://fathom.video/share/4yXj4QzosCmwri_9ngynsJTHxW75jncZ?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [The package aims to cover all aspects of digital presence and growth, from SEO to thought leadership](https://fathom.video/share/4yXj4QzosCmwri_9ngynsJTHxW75jncZ?tab=summary&timestamp=49.0)
  - [GrowthX could potentially be part of the recommended stack in this package](https://fathom.video/share/4yXj4QzosCmwri_9ngynsJTHxW75jncZ?tab=summary&timestamp=157.0)
  - [Both parties are interested in collaboration and further developing this concept](https://fathom.video/share/4yXj4QzosCmwri_9ngynsJTHxW75jncZ?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)

## Topics

### Go-to-Market Engine Package Concept

  - [Penelope's idea: Create a comprehensive package for portfolio companies ready for growth](https://fathom.video/share/4yXj4QzosCmwri_9ngynsJTHxW75jncZ?tab=summary&timestamp=49.0)
  - [Components: SEO, ChatGPT presence, LinkedIn strategy, Reddit presence, brand recognition](https://fathom.video/share/4yXj4QzosCmwri_9ngynsJTHxW75jncZ?tab=summary&timestamp=49.0)
  - [Potential pricing: \~$100K for full implementation](https://fathom.video/share/4yXj4QzosCmwri_9ngynsJTHxW75jncZ?tab=summary&timestamp=128.0)
  - [Initial approach: Start privately with portfolio companies, then potentially make it public](https://fathom.video/share/4yXj4QzosCmwri_9ngynsJTHxW75jncZ?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
  - [Goal: Create a "flywheel" effect for company growth](https://fathom.video/share/4yXj4QzosCmwri_9ngynsJTHxW75jncZ?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)

### Potential Collaboration with GrowthX

  - [GrowthX could be part of the recommended stack in the package](https://fathom.video/share/4yXj4QzosCmwri_9ngynsJTHxW75jncZ?tab=summary&timestamp=157.0)
  - [Jason offered to provide scaffolding and ideas for content, webinars, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/4yXj4QzosCmwri_9ngynsJTHxW75jncZ?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
  - [Discussed the possibility of GrowthX contributing a chapter to a potential field guide](https://fathom.video/share/4yXj4QzosCmwri_9ngynsJTHxW75jncZ?tab=summary&timestamp=993.0)
  - [Both parties see value in collaboration and sharing expertise](https://fathom.video/share/4yXj4QzosCmwri_9ngynsJTHxW75jncZ?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)

### Target Companies and Use Cases

  - [Focus on companies at growth stage, typically Series B or later](https://fathom.video/share/4yXj4QzosCmwri_9ngynsJTHxW75jncZ?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
  - [Example companies discussed: Vizcom, Goldcast](https://fathom.video/share/4yXj4QzosCmwri_9ngynsJTHxW75jncZ?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
  - [Use case: Identifying and filling gaps in existing growth strategies](https://fathom.video/share/4yXj4QzosCmwri_9ngynsJTHxW75jncZ?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)

### Tools and Strategies Discussed

  - [AdamX: Tool for evaluating digital presence and benchmarking](https://fathom.video/share/4yXj4QzosCmwri_9ngynsJTHxW75jncZ?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)
  - [Audience Lab: Platform with search history data for identifying high-intent leads](https://fathom.video/share/4yXj4QzosCmwri_9ngynsJTHxW75jncZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1023.0)
  - [Meta ads targeting: Using specific email lists for direct targeting](https://fathom.video/share/4yXj4QzosCmwri_9ngynsJTHxW75jncZ?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

### Content and Community Building

  - [GrowthX's community focus: Providing resources on AI for growth and marketing](https://fathom.video/share/4yXj4QzosCmwri_9ngynsJTHxW75jncZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1176.0)
  - [Discussed potential for webinars, courses, and collaborations with experts in specific areas](https://fathom.video/share/4yXj4QzosCmwri_9ngynsJTHxW75jncZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1192.0)
  - [Compared approach to other platforms like Reforge](https://fathom.video/share/4yXj4QzosCmwri_9ngynsJTHxW75jncZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1232.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Penelope to create a flywheel/workflow diagram for the go-to-market engine package](https://fathom.video/share/4yXj4QzosCmwri_9ngynsJTHxW75jncZ?tab=summary&timestamp=794.0)
  - [Jason to send case studies, examples, and information on GrowthX's offerings](https://fathom.video/share/4yXj4QzosCmwri_9ngynsJTHxW75jncZ?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
  - [Penelope to discuss the concept with Al at Vizcom as a potential guinea pig](https://fathom.video/share/4yXj4QzosCmwri_9ngynsJTHxW75jncZ?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)
  - [Both parties to continue exploring collaboration opportunities and sharing insights](https://fathom.video/share/4yXj4QzosCmwri_9ngynsJTHxW75jncZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)
